response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates extensive fullstack experience with over 12 years in software development, including leadership roles and contributions to scalable systems handling high traffic (e.g., micro-services infrastructure at Dunnhumby). Her expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB aligns well with the primary stack, while her work with Kotlin/Java and AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq) shows adaptability. However, her current role lacks direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest, and her Kubernetes experience is limited to open-source project deployment rather than enterprise-scale systems.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching primary stack requirements
Proven track record in scalable systems (handling millions of HTTP requests/sec) and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong problem-solving focus with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practices
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary backend framework) and Vitest (testing framework)
Kubernetes experience is project-specific (open-source GIS platform) rather than enterprise-scale deployment
Primary backend experience leans toward Node.js rather than Java/Kotlin, though secondary stack is covered

key_factors.factor: Scalable systems and AI-agent infrastructure experience
